title: achras hexandra
intro: Achras hexandra, also known as the Tung-Oil Tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its ability to produce tung oil, a valuable resource used in various industrial and medicinal applications. The medicinal properties of Achras hexandra include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin and hair health, and supporting immune function. Achras hexandra can be prepared in various herbal forms, including oil, extract, and tincture, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
